title: Tilray Brands Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record International Cannabis Growth
text: Tilray Brands delivered strong Q4 2025 earnings with record international cannabis revenue growth. International cannabis revenue increased by 19% in fiscal 2025, with Q4 increasing by 71% when excluding Australia. European cannabis revenue grew 112%, demonstrating the company's success in international markets. Q4 adjusted EBITDA reached $27.6 million, the company's second-highest quarterly consolidated adjusted EBITDA. Total cannabis gross margin increased by 700 basis points in fiscal 2025, showing significant improvement in profitability. Beverage net revenue increased 19% to $240.6 million in fiscal 2025 due to the acquisition of craft beverage brands. The company maintained a strong financial liquidity position. Fiscal Year 2026 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $62 million to $72 million reflected management confidence in continued operational execution and growth.
